concierge · online
Saturday check-in · Room 214
Hi! I'm Rachel, checking in tomorrow evening — late arrival around 10pm. What's the best way to get to the hotel from Larnaca airport? 😊
Hi Rachel! 👋 Looking forward to welcoming you tomorrow.

At that hour the easiest option is a private transfer — no direct bus after 8pm in summer. Journey is about 45 minutes.

Shall I arrange one for you?
Oh that's perfect, yes please! My flight lands at 9pm so 10pm check-in should work nicely 🙏
On it — sending the request to our taxi partner now. I'll confirm as soon as they reply 🚗

All confirmed, Rachel 🎉

Good evening, Mr. Stavrou.

Each month we hold a private draw for members who have been with us for more than five years. This month, we are delighted to say — you are our winner.
Your prize is a private dinner for two at the Rooftop Terrace, Saturday evening, sunset seating.
